# Boise Sealcoating

> Boise's trusted asphalt sealcoating pros. Driveway sealcoating, crack filling & parking lot maintenance. Free quotes. Serving Boise, Meridian, Nampa, Eagle & Caldwell.

Boise Sealcoating is a asphalt sealcoating and driveway contractor serving Boise, ID and surrounding areas: Boise, Meridian, Nampa, Eagle, Caldwell.
Rated 4.9 stars across 87 reviews. Phone: (208) 555-0148. Website: https://boisesealcoating.com

## Services
- Driveway Sealcoating
- Asphalt Crack Filling
- Parking Lot Sealcoating
- Free Sealcoating Quotes

## Service Area
Boise, Meridian, Nampa, Eagle, Caldwell

## Frequently Asked Questions
### How much does driveway sealcoating cost in Boise?
Most residential driveway sealcoating jobs in Boise run $150 to $500 depending on square footage and condition. We give a free written quote before starting.

### How often should I sealcoat my driveway?
In Idaho's climate we recommend sealcoating asphalt every 2 to 3 years to protect against UV, water, and freeze-thaw cracking and extend its life.

### When is the best time to sealcoat in Boise?
Late spring through early fall is ideal, when temperatures stay above 50°F so the sealer cures properly. Call (208) 555-0148 to schedule.

### Do you sealcoat commercial parking lots?
Yes, we handle both residential driveways and commercial parking lots across the Treasure Valley.

### Do you fill driveway cracks before sealcoating?
Yes. We recommend cleaning and filling noticeable asphalt cracks before applying sealer so water stays out and the finish lasts longer. We'll note any crack repair needed in your Boise-area quote.

### How long do I need to stay off my driveway after sealcoating?
Most Boise driveways should stay off-limits to vehicles for 24 to 48 hours after sealcoating, depending on temperature and sun exposure. We'll give you a safe re-entry window before we leave.

### How much does parking lot sealcoating cost in Boise?
Commercial parking lot sealcoating costs in Boise usually depend on total square footage, striping needs, and how much crack filling or patching is required. We provide on-site quotes for lots in Boise, Meridian, Nampa, Eagle, and Caldwell.

## Contact
Call (208) 555-0148 for a free quote. Serving Boise and the surrounding region.
